products.name: Botanical Revival Serum
products.description: A lightweight, fragrance-free serum powered by encapsulated hyaluronic acid and raw botanical extracts to replenish luminosity.
products.usageInstructions: Apply 2-3 drops to damp skin morning and night.

products.name: Restorative Moisture Cream
products.description: An ultra-rich, velvety cream formulated to repair the skin's barrier and lock in intense hydration for 48 hours.
products.usageInstructions: Massage a dime-sized amount gently into the face and neck as the final step in your routine.

products.name: Radiance Renewal Cleanser
products.description: A gentle, gel-to-milk cleanser that dissolves impurities without stripping the skin's natural moisture barrier.
products.usageInstructions: Massage onto damp skin in circular motions. Rinse with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening.

products.name: Luminous Eye Elixir
products.description: A featherlight eye concentrate with caffeine and bakuchiol to visibly reduce dark circles and fine lines.
products.usageInstructions: Pat gently around the orbital bone using your ring finger, morning and evening.

products.name: Sage & Rose Facial Mist
products.description: A soothing hydrating mist infused with wild sage extract and Bulgarian rose water to balance and prep the skin.
products.usageInstructions: Mist evenly over face after cleansing or throughout the day for an instant refresh.

products.name: Overnight Renewal Mask
products.description: A rich overnight sleeping mask that works with your skin's natural repair cycle to deliver a dewy, plumped complexion by morning.
products.usageInstructions: Apply as the last step of your evening routine. Leave on overnight and rinse in the morning.

laptopReferrals.name: Modern Creator Workstation
laptopReferrals.tagline: The ultimate tool for designing your life.
